subcodes.title: Words to Percy Woodcock
subcodes.first_line: Tell the friends the matter of building the Mashreq'Ul Azkar in Chicago is of supreme importance. Even if it be only a single room now it will have greater effect than the largest temples of the future. The most important thing in this day is the speedy erection of the Edifice... Its mystery is great and cannot be unveiled just yet. In the future it will be made plain.
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @prophecy and fulfillment, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
